name: Digital Marketing Agency
description: Full-stack digital marketing squad: strategy, copy, landing pages, traffic, content, performance — 8 specialized roles for end-to-end campaign execution.

suggestedExecutors.role: Marketing strategist — defines campaign goals, funnel architecture, audience, and assigns tasks to specialists
Writes all copy — headlines, body text, CTAs, email sequences, ad copy. Copy exists before any design.
Builds landing pages, sales pages, and event pages — full production stack including animations, SEO/LLMO, tracking, and performance.
Manages paid traffic — Meta Ads, Google Ads. Configures Pixel, UTMs, audiences, campaign structure.
Handles organic discoverability — SEO strategy, on-page optimization, LLMO (LLM.txt, structured data, AI search optimization).
Creates organic content — social posts, newsletters, blog articles, video scripts aligned with campaign goals.
Analyzes metrics — conversion rates, LCP/CLS, PageSpeed, funnel drop-offs, A/B test results. Reports and recommends optimizations.
Coordinates the agency squad — routes tasks, synthesizes outputs, ensures copy exists before design, tracking before launch.

productionGates.rule: Copy must be approved by @copywriter before @page-builder starts layout work
Pixel, GTM, and UTM capture must be verified by @traffic-manager before any paid traffic is sent
PageSpeed mobile ≥ 90 and LCP < 2.5s must be verified before launch
